root.speaker: Sky-Scribe Vell
root.text:
I file the sky. Charts on the left; tablets on the
right. The middle drawer is the one that does not
move.

choices.label: The one that does not move?

fixed.speaker: Sky-Scribe Vell
fixed.text:
Every chart has one. The pivot of the great wheel.
Sailors call it North; Lirien calls it the Stayer.

seven.speaker: Sky-Scribe Vell
seven.text:
Seven slow walkers cross the sky over a year. The
tablets record where they pause. Lirien predicts the
next pause; she is usually right.

props.message:
Star-charts.

The seven that walk slow. The one that does not move.

Sky-tablets stacked by season. Each is a thin slate
etched with sigil-points and faint compass lines.
